snapshot:
# Withy workflow context

# Withy workflow guide

Withy is available as a task workflow tool. Before you write or edit any code for build work — a feature, a
behavior change, a refactor, or anything beyond a trivial one-line fix — stop and propose creating a task first; do not
start the work until the user agrees or declines. Pure questions, explanations, and read-only investigation need no
task. When unsure, ask rather than assume it is too small.

If the user agrees, follow the Next-Action injected below to start the task, then follow the injected workflow state.
The workflow — not you — decides whether the task is light or full; do not bypass it. If the user declines, continue
without one.

## Rules

- When an active task already covers the user's request, continue that task instead of asking to create another one.
- The flow advances only via `withy next`; on a skill node, run the node's skill first and let it advance once the step is genuinely done. An agent claiming "done" does not advance a step.
- Steps that declare artifacts / checks / approvals must pass their gate before moving on.
- When the next move is unclear, follow the injected Next-Action.

## Task commands

```bash
withy task start "<title>"   # create a task from a title, or focus an existing task id
withy task status            # show the current task's node and phase
withy task list --mine       # list your tasks (drop --mine to see everyone's)
withy next                   # advance the current node — the core flow primitive
withy approve                # record human approval for a gated node
```

## Discover more

The list above is just the essentials. For the full surface, ask the CLI — its help always matches the installed version:

```bash
withy -h            # all top-level commands (task, next, approve, rewind, knowledge, ...)
withy task -h       # task subcommands: status, list, start, archive
withy <command> -h  # flags and details for any single command
```

- Developer: yan (yan)
- Git branch: master

    · M .withy/knowledge/wiki/design/index.md
    · M packages/cli/src/templates/common/skills/knowledge/SKILL.md
    · …(+2 more)
- Recent commits:
    · 362ecbd :card_file_box: (task) archive inject agents redesign task
    · 0a3b483 :memo: (knowledge) sync inject agents design (§3.6)
    · 9f120ec :sparkles: (app) redesign inject agents as flippable ID cards
    · 5494968 :art: apply prettier to pre-existing drift
    · f8722d1 :card_file_box: (task) archive subagent dispatch task
- NO ACTIVE TASK · Next-Action: describe your goal and I will run `withy task start "<title>" --json`

text: 请你查看当前活跃的withy任务继续

summary: 跨工具 agent 派发阶段一 brainstorm 完成:prd.md/design.md 已核实并修正两处偏差(model 字段未实现的错误引用;codex/opencode 无会话 env 的已核实限制,验收标准相应放宽),8 步实现清单已登记(checklist.json),用户已批准完整方案。

grill-me 完成:压力测试 prd.md/design.md 并修正若干实质缺口——engine 字段类型改为 string|undefined(不提前窄化为 AgentTool)+ 空白值规整为 undefined;发现 validateWorkflow 有 cli/commands/task.ts 与 app/api/workflows/[id]/route.ts 两处独立调用点,补齐第二处的 engine 校验接入(design 定为 resolveAgentEngine + enginePlatformAvailable 两个谓词,后者复用 deploy.ts 的 configDir 约定);AgentToolSchema 定为从 AGENT_PLATFORMS 派生,不手写字面量;修正 opencode sessionIdEnv 的留空/占位表述不一致。checklist 第 2/5/6 项已同步更新,用户已批准。

text: registry 新增 opencode 平台条目并导出 resolveCurrentPlatform(env)
store/agents.ts + agents/agents.ts 解析角色 frontmatter 的可选 engine 字段(string|undefined,空白值规整为 undefined),新增 resolveAgentEngine(scope, role) 读取口
workflow/dispatch.ts 新增纯函数 routeAgent({ engine }, currentPlatform)
DispatchBlock 扩展 mode/engine 字段,dispatchBlock() 接入 resolveCurrentPlatform + 角色 engine + routeAgent

validateWorkflow 新增 engine 未知/未装告警——ValidateContext 加 resolveAgentEngine/enginePlatformAvailable 两个谓词,并在 cli/commands/task.ts 与 app/api/workflows/[id]/route.ts 两处既有 validateWorkflow 调用点各自补上注入(两处都已注入 agentExists,照同一范式加两行)
types.ts 新增 RunRecordSchema / HandbackSchema(含 RunStatusSchema/HandbackStatusSchema)纯 zod 契约;AgentToolSchema 从 agents/registry.ts 的 AGENT_PLATFORMS 键派生,不在 types.ts 手写字面量清单
新增 opencode CLI configurator(templates/opencode/agents/.gitkeep + configureOpencode + PLATFORM_CONFIGURATORS 登记;不需要 skills/.gitkeep,installAgentSkills 统一读 common/skills/)
全量校验:typecheck / lint / core build / 相关 vitest 套件

summary: 跨工具派发阶段一实现完成,8 项 checklist 全部完成并逐项验证(typecheck/lint/test 全绿):①registry 加 opencode + resolveCurrentPlatform;②engine frontmatter 解析(resolveAgentEngine,空白值规整);③routeAgent 纯函数;④DispatchBlock 加 mode/engine + 诚实文案;⑤validateWorkflow engine 告警(两谓词,cli/app 两处调用点均接线);⑥RunRecord/HandbackSchema 纯契约(AgentToolSchema 从 registry 派生);⑦opencode CLI configurator;⑧全量校验。实现期额外发现并修复一个历史遗留的跨包类型坍缩坑(defineAgentPlatforms 的 mapped-type 返回值在 .d.ts 消费时丢失窄联合,导致 cli 的 PLATFORM_CONFIGURATORS 穷举检查实际不生效),已实测复现+修复+反向验证,详见 core.md §5.1 与 status.md K18/K19/C16。全部改动已同步回 prd.md/design.md/checklist 与知识库(cross-tool-dispatch.md、core.md、status.md),knowledge lint 0/0。

check 完成:重新跑全量 typecheck/lint/test/build(独立于 dev 步骤,全绿);扫描 diff 确认无 debug 日志、无 TODO/FIXME、无 @ts-ignore/eslint-disable;交叉检查 agents/deploy.ts 里另一处 Object.values(AGENT_PLATFORMS) 用法(用精确联合类型 RegisteredAgentPlatformConfig,agentDef 三平台都有,不受 platformList() 改动影响)。发现两处需向用户说明但不需要在本任务内处理:pnpm-workspace.yaml 因 approve-builds 多了 allowBuilds 配置(环境副作用,非功能改动);web 侧改动只加了两个 ctx 谓词到已有 validateWorkflow 调用,渲染管线(issues[])未变,未做真人浏览器验证。无需修复项。

finish 收尾:核对 prd.md 7 条验收标准与实际交付一致(engine 解析、routeAgent 矩阵、resolveCurrentPlatform、DispatchBlock mode/engine、validateWorkflow 告警、RunRecord/handback schema、全量校验均已达成;AC3「多平台同时设置取遍历序」的多平台场景因 codex/opencode 尚无真实 sessionIdEnv 而暂时无法触发,记为已知限制而非缺口,与 Risk 1 一致)。工作树已分类:本任务改动(core/cli/app 源码+测试、design.md/prd.md/checklist、cross-tool-dispatch.md/core.md/status.md 知识页)待用户决定是否提交;pnpm-workspace.yaml 是本会话 approve-builds 的环境副作用,非功能改动;harness.md 与 knowledge/skills/knowledge/SKILL.md 是会话开始前就存在的无关改动,未触碰。知识沉淀已在 dev 步骤完成(core.md 坑记录、status.md K18/K19/C16、cross-tool-dispatch.md 风险更新、log.md),knowledge lint 0/0。
